description: Post-implementation coverage for PG-191. Every in-scope changed line is now exercised by colocated TDD tests. The authoritative numeric enforcement is the pre-ship diff-coverage gate (Sonar new_coverage >=80% on changed lines), run under the fleet gate-lock.

validators_task_settings.note: 17 tests: bounds, reminder superRefine, template dedup, max-count, no-op, defaults

api_task_settings_router.note: 14 tests: get upsert-on-first, per-field update, cross-tenant where, resetToDefaults, corrupt-JSON normalize fallback

web_task_settings.note: 29 tests across page/content/3 sections: render, save, per-field fallback, a11y contracts, empty-state, template add/edit/remove

after_totals.note: All new source lines covered by the above. Diff-coverage authority = pre-ship gate.
